title: B's Instruments
description: Plugin that adds survival friendly Musical Instruments
body:
# B's Instruments
![Me holding a bass guitar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e708b1fde70c616ec57a88dec47031b79e7998f.png)

### Featuring
- 16 unique musical instruments
- Textures for all
- Variations in tone between instruments
- Crafting recipes for all
- Natural structure chests can contain an instrument
- Command to mute annoying players
### How to set up
1. Put the jar into the plugins folder
2. Include these lines in your server.properties _(or install the resource pack manually)_
   
```
require-resource-pack=true
resource-pack=https\://raw.githubusercontent.com/BiRavv/B_s_Instruments/master/%C2%A7dB's%20Instruments.zip
resource-pack-sha1=7a9fbfff7099615b71ec212d589a6a031d771ca0
```
### How to use
- By crafting a **Note Block** you can unlock all instruments in your recipe book
- **Put your instrument in offhand and do right, left or shift click for different tones! Your pitch** _(looking direction up-down)_ **determines the pitch of your note**



- Using the command **/mute** you can mute all instruments
- Using **/geti** operators can get an instrument by name or get all *(/geti all)*
